title: Brand Kit
subtitle: Colors, fonts, logos — the look
intro: We're going to load all of this into the AI so anything it writes or designs comes out looking like you. No need to be precise — best-guesses you can refine later are better than blanks. Auto-saves as you go.

fields.label: Brand name
fields.placeholder: How it appears on packaging / the site

fields.label: Tagline or positioning line
fields.help: If you have one. Skip if not.
fields.placeholder: e.g. "Buy it once. Repair it forever."

fields.label: How would you describe how the brand sounds, in one or two sentences?
fields.placeholder: Plainspoken and durable, never precious. / Warm and small-batch, never corporate.
fields.help: If a brand new copywriter joined tomorrow, what would you tell them about your voice?

steps.title: Color palette
steps.intro: List the colors you actually use — primary, accent, neutrals. Best-guess hex codes are fine; we'll refine.

itemFields.label: When to use it
itemFields.placeholder: Primary CTAs and headlines / soft backgrounds only / never on text

steps.title: Typography
steps.intro: What fonts do you use? Names are fine — we'll handle web-safe equivalents.

fields.label: Notes on the display font
fields.placeholder: All caps only. Wide letter-spacing. Never below 18px.

fields.label: Body font
fields.placeholder: e.g. EB Garamond, Inter, Source Sans

fields.label: Notes on the body font
fields.placeholder: Workhorse for paragraphs. Never below 14px screen / 10pt print.

fields.label: (Optional) Accent / editorial font
fields.placeholder: e.g. Playfair Display, Fraunces — leave blank if you only use two faces

fields.label: Any typography rules to follow?
fields.placeholder: Three faces, no fourth. Italics for emphasis, never bold. Never set the wordmark in another font.
fields.help: The "don't do this" stuff is as useful as the "do this" stuff.

steps.title: Logo & visual references
steps.intro: Upload your logo files (PNG / SVG / PDF up to 20 MB), or paste a link if they live in Drive or Dropbox.

fields.label: Primary logo
fields.help: The default lockup — what you'd put on a business card.

fields.label: Logo rules
fields.placeholder: Don't recolor, restretch, or rotate. Minimum size: 24px digital. Clear space: 25% of the mark's diameter.

fields.label: Brands or visuals you admire / want to feel adjacent to
fields.placeholder: Patagonia for the rugged-with-heart thing. Aesop for the apothecary restraint. Avoid the Glossier-millennial-pink moment.

steps.title: Voice — do's & don'ts
steps.intro: Lists are great here. We'll bake these straight into the AI's voice profile.

fields.label: DO sound like this
fields.placeholder:
One per line:
- Plainspoken, never precious
- Specific over generic — name the thing
- Warm but not chatty

fields.label: DON'T sound like this
fields.placeholder:
One per line:
- "Synergy," "leverage," "circle back"
- Emojis in customer email
- Apologetic openers ("sorry to bother you…")

fields.label: (Optional) Examples — copy you love, copy you hate
fields.placeholder: Paste a paragraph or two you'd want the AI to learn from. Or a competitor's line you'd never want to write.
